name: m365
title: Microsoft 365
description: Read, search, draft, and archive email; manage calendar events; search and read OneDrive files. Uses Microsoft Graph API with delegated auth.

credentials.label: Tenant ID
credentials.description: Azure AD tenant GUID. Find it in Azure Portal → Microsoft Entra ID → Overview.

credentials.label: Application (client) ID
credentials.description: GUID of the Azure AD app registration.

credentials.label: Client secret
credentials.description: Generated at App registrations → Certificates & secrets → New client secret. Copy the VALUE, not the ID.

outlook_email_search.description: Search inbox by query, sender, date, or unread flag

outlook_email_read.description: Read one email's full body by message id

outlook_email_draft.description: Create a draft email in the user's mailbox (does NOT send)

outlook_email_archive.description: Move an email from Inbox to Archive

calendar_search.description: List calendar events in a date range

calendar_create_event.description: Create a new calendar event with attendees, location, body

calendar_delete_event.description: Cancel and delete a calendar event

onedrive_search.description: Find files in the user's OneDrive by name or content

onedrive_read.description: Download and read the contents of a OneDrive file
